name: accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month tool
description: For accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month, manual categorization causes delays in report generation. We automate expense categorization instead of manual expense tracking and categorization using spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Manual categorization of expenses leads to time-consuming reports and potential errors.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Manual categorization of expenses leads to time-consuming reports and potential errors.
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month, manual categorization causes delays in report generation. We automate expense categorization instead of manual expense tracking and categorization using spreadsheets.
locked_fields.current_alternative: manual expense tracking and categorization using spreadsheets

one_liner: For accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month, manual categorization causes delays in report generation. We automate expense categorization instead of manual expense tracking and categorization using spreadsheets.
